mods.name: Performance Intake
mods.description: An upgraded intake for the M133 2.0L turbo-four. Improves turbo spool sound and provides better airflow to the most powerful production 4-cylinder.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox. Install carbon fiber intake assembly. The M133 intake path is tight — ensure heat shielding is in place. 20 minutes.

mods.name: Performance Exhaust
mods.description: The A45 is quiet from factory. A performance exhaust adds aggression to the turbocharged four-cylinder and reduces backpressure.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the downpipe back. Quad tip design matches the factory rear diffuser. Valved systems use Bluetooth controller or AMG mode button. 1.5 hours.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the A45 by 20–25mm for a sportier stance. The AMG adaptive dampers remain fully functional with compatible springs.
mods.installNotes: Ensure springs are compatible with AMG adaptive dampers. Spring compressor required. All four corners. Alignment mandatory after install.

mods.name: ECU Tune (Stage 1)
mods.description: The M133 engine responds extremely well to tuning. Stage 1 adds 50–70hp, making the A45 one of the fastest hot hatches in a straight line.
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II or piggyback module. TCU tune recommended for the 7-speed DCT to improve shift speed and remove torque limitations. Requires 93+ octane.

mods.name: Performance Downpipe
mods.description: A high-flow downpipe reduces turbo backpressure for faster spool and significant power gains when combined with a Stage 2 tune.
mods.partNumbers: Wagner Tuning Catted DP, Milltek Large Bore DP
mods.installNotes: Access from below. Pre-soak turbo outlet bolts. The M133 downpipe is tight against the subframe. Must retune to Stage 2. Catless needs software fix for CEL. 2–3 hours.

mods.name: Upgraded Intercooler
mods.description: The factory intercooler heat soaks rapidly on the high-output M133 engine. An upgraded unit maintains consistent power output in all conditions.
mods.installNotes: Remove front bumper and stock intercooler. Larger core with aluminum end tanks. Transfer charge pipe connections. 2–3 hours. Critical for Stage 2+ tunes and warm climate driving.

mods.name: Upgraded Turbocharger
mods.description: Replace the stock IHI turbo with a hybrid or larger unit for power beyond the M133's stock turbo limit of approximately 420hp.
mods.partNumbers: TTE480 Hybrid Turbo, Pure Turbos PURE500
mods.installNotes: Hybrid turbos use the stock manifold with upgraded compressor and turbine wheels. Requires HPFP upgrade, larger injectors, intercooler, and custom tune. DCT clutch service recommended. 12+ hours.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers provide precise ride height and damping control for the A45's AWD chassis, transforming handling on street and track.
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement. Adaptive damper delete or bypass required. Set ride height 15–20mm below stock. The A45 benefits from slightly stiffer rear springs to reduce understeer. Full alignment required.
